title: Installed vs Template Drift Sweep
findings: 扫过 existing registry ISS-20260609-001..059、doctor 证据、.claude/.codex hooks/skills、hook config 模板、bootstrap canonical 与安装测试。新增 3 个未登记漂移：AGENTS managed block 仍是旧 agents.meta 文案；遗留 archive-hint.cjs 文件仍安装在两端且内容互相漂移；当前 Codex PreToolUse 顺序与模板相反而测试只做包含断言。
issues_found: [{"title":"Root AGENTS.md managed block still carries retired agents.meta bootstrap text","severity":"medium","description":"The live root AGENTS.md fabric:bootstrap block is not byte-aligned with BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL: it still tells developers not to edit .fabric/agents.meta.json and lists that file as a DON'T item, while the canonical template now says Fabric-managed derived state and no longer names agents.meta. fabric-doctor.txt also reports bootstrap_snapshot_drift, so the installed AI policy surface can keep teaching retired project-local state semantics until install/doctor rewrites it.","location":"AGENTS.md:19; AGENTS.md:29; AGENTS.md:42; packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:69; packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:79","fix_direction":"Run the canonical bootstrap rewrite path (`fabric install` or doctor fix) so AGENTS.md is regenerated from .fabric/AGENTS.md/BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL; keep the live AGENTS.md drift guard in CI so retired agents.meta text cannot remain in the checked-in installed surface.","affected_components":["AGENTS.md","bootstrap managed block","BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL","AI client policy docs"],"tags":["installed-output-drift","bootstrap-drift","agents-meta-retired","live-state"]},{"title":"Legacy archive-hint.cjs files remain under installed hook trees after the fabric-hint rename","severity":"low","description":"The current installed trees still contain .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs and .codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs even though packages/cli/templates/hooks has no archive-hint.cjs source and install now copies fabric-hint.cjs. The install sweep only strips config entries by basename before merge; it does not delete the stale script files, and fabric-doctor.txt reports cross-client content drift for archive-hint.cjs. These orphan scripts preserve retired local knowledge/pending logic and create noisy deterministic drift in installed hook audits.","location":".claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs:1; .codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs:1; packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:1588; packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:1716; packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts:490","fix_direction":"Extend the rc27 cleanup to remove legacy archive-hint.cjs files from .claude/.codex/.cursor hook directories during install, or explicitly exclude retired basenames from hook-content drift checks after config sweep. Add an install regression that seeds archive-hint.cjs files and asserts they are gone after reinstall.","affected_components":["installed hook files","install cleanup","fabric doctor hooks_content_drift","install-skills-and-hooks tests"],"tags":["installed-output-drift","legacy-hook","archive-hint-rename","doctor-drift"]},{"title":"Installed Codex PreToolUse hook order drifts from the codex hook template","severity":"low","description":"The live .codex/hooks.json runs cite-policy-evict.cjs before knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs, while packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json puts knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs first and cite-policy-evict.cjs second. The integration test only asserts that PreToolUse contains knowledge-hint-narrow and the matcher, so an order drift in the installed output can survive even though hook order is part of the generated config contract.","location":".codex/hooks.json:13; .codex/hooks.json:16; .codex/hooks.json:20; packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json:13; packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json:16; packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/codex-hooks.json:20; packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts:206","fix_direction":"Canonicalize Codex fabric-owned hook entries on reinstall and add an exact ordered assertion for events.PreToolUse against the template fragment, while preserving unrelated user hooks outside the fabric-owned sweep.","affected_components":[".codex/hooks.json","codex hook config template","install config merge tests"],"tags":["installed-output-drift","codex-hooks","hook-order","test-gate-drift"]}]
